part.partDescription: One Piece 2-Up Squareback Seat - Double Diamond - Sky Blue Stitch - FL '08-'25
part.bullet1: Double diamond stitch pattern with colored thread options offer a new take on a classic favorite
part.bullet2: Crafted for rider comfort, the seat features a specially designed recessed cross section that alleviates tailbone pressure, offering both comfort and style in one sleek package
part.bullet3: Wide driver bucket seat positions the rider slightly back for optimal comfort while providing exceptional lower back support with its high-rising wall
part.bullet4: Wide squared-off tail section provides a stable foundation for passengers or luggage, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable ride for the 2-up rider
part.bullet5: Positions riders slightly further back compared to stock with significantly enhanced lower back support
part.bullet6: Performance-packed cover features split-panel, contrasting stitch, perforated look, and functional gripper vinyl
part.bullet7: Carefully curated tail section allows for comfortable 2-up riding
part.bullet8: Mustang's proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no break-in and retains shape and support after years of use
part.bullet9: Marine-grade fiberglass baseplate for long lasting support and durability, with polyurethane bumpers to absorb vibration

part.partDescription: Deluxe Touring Solo Seat - w/ Backrest - Gunmetal Stitch - FLT/FLH '23-'25
part.bullet1: Features Deluxe pattern with eye-catching carbon fiber inlay
part.bullet2: Wide seat sits the driver 1.75" farther back than the stock seat
part.bullet3: Driver backrest is fully adjustable and removable
part.bullet4: Bucket style saddle positions rider in the seat for a more controlled and comfortable ride
part.bullet5: Mustang's proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no break-in and retains shape and support after years of use
part.bullet6: Marine-grade fiberglass baseplate for long-lasting support and durability, with polyurethane bumpers to absorb vibration
part.bullet7: High-quality expanded vinyl cover offers the appearance of leather and durability to withstand the elements
part.bullet8: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Studded Regal Seat - '97-'07 FLT
part.bullet1: Nose is narrower than stock; allows for optimum rider comfort and less knee bend
part.bullet2: These touring seats are the ultimate in design and cushioning
part.bullet3: Top covering made of highest-quality expanded vinyl
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: One-Piece Deluxe Touring Seat - Black w/ American Beauty Red Stitching - FL '08-'25
part.productName: One-Piece Deluxe Touring Seat with Removable Backrest Option
part.bullet1: The receiver for the optional, removable and fully adjustable driver backrest is built directly into the seats baseplate
part.bullet2: The front seat sets the rider back 1.75" compared to the stock seat plus it angles the body for long-distance comfort
part.bullet3: The rear seat provides support across its full width and keeps the passenger firmly in the comfort zone
part.bullet4: Styled after state-of-the-art automotive interior designs, the seat features exquisite stitching detail
part.bullet5: Removable driver backrests sold separately
part.bullet6: Seat will not work with Mustang or Harley Davidson® frame-mounted backrest kit. Seat will fit with handrail. All seating position notes are compared to the standard Electra Glide touring position. If your seat is a reduced-reach, extended reach or low seat, these comparisons may not apply.

part.partDescription: Heated Touring Seat - Plain - FL '08-'25
part.bullet1: Wire harness hooks to accessory port in front of battery; seat has power only when the ignition key is turned on and accessory toggle switch below the handlebars is flipped up
part.bullet2: Mustang's one-piece touring design provides the rider and passenger with the fullest, most comfortable seat possible
part.bullet3: Dual-zone high/low heat settings for driver and passenger right on the side of the seat
part.bullet4: Baseplate is open in the middle to accept a Mustang or stock H-D driver backrest kit
part.bullet5: Seat pan is constructed with extra rugged, triple-layered fiberglass
part.bullet6: Illuminated switches
part.bullet7: Made in the USA
part.bullet8: Does not require any OE controllers or switches to function.
part.bullet9: Seat will fit with a handrail.

part.partDescription: Tripper™ Solo Seat - Double Diamond - Nightster '22-'25

part.partDescription: Squareback Sissy Bar Pad - Black - Diamond Stitch - Chief '22-'23
part.bullet1: Add an aggressive style and upgrade comfort on your Chief with a matching sissy bar pad, made specifically for the new Indian Chief low-rise bar
part.bullet2: Bucketed rider area provides excellent support with an aggresseive look and diamond-stitched perforated center panels
part.bullet3: Hand sewn cover with classic single diamond stitching made from marine-grade expanded vinyl
part.bullet4: Mustang's proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no breaking in and retains shape and support after years of use
part.bullet5: Marine-grade fiberglass baseplate for long-lasting support and durability, with polyurethane bumpers to absorb vibration
part.bullet6: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: Super Touring Seat - Driver's Backrest - FLRT/FLTRT '15-'25
part.bullet1: Clean look and feel with an expanded vinyl cover and detailed automotive-inspired stitching
part.bullet2: Marine-grade fiberglass pan and all-day comfort foam supports you in an ideal cruising posture that sits riders 2" further back than our Standard Touring seats
part.bullet3: Features a front bucket drain hole and built-in receiver for optional driver backrest (sold separately)
part.bullet4: Will not work with a frame-mounted driver backrest kit.

part.partDescription: Super Tripper Seat - Carbon - FL '08-'25

part.bullet3: Classic style features traditional black stitch lines
part.bullet4: High-quality expanded vinyl covering
part.bullet5: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: Low Squareback Seat - Double Diamond - Dark Cherry Stitch - FLH/FLT '23-'25
part.bullet1: All-day comfort with custom styling, performance-focused support, and a bold look
part.bullet2: Low-profile bucket designed for optimal touring posture
part.bullet3: 4” rise at the rear provides crucial lower back support over long distances
part.bullet4: With a seat height of approximately 27-1/2” from the ground, it offers a confident stance for riders while maintaining ergonomic efficiency for extended time in the saddle
part.bullet5: A squared-off passenger section offers functional support for two-up touring without disrupting the sleek, performance-inspired silhouette
part.bullet6: Mustang’s proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no break-in and retains shape and support after years of use
part.bullet7: Marine-grade fiberglass baseplate for long-lasting support and durability, with polyurethane bumpers to absorb vibration
part.bullet8: High-quality expanded vinyl cover that offers the appearance of leather and durability to withstand the elements

part.partDescription: Squareback Seat - Black - Tuck-n-Roll - Breakout '18-'21
part.bullet1: Delivers an updated style to a classic look for HD
part.bullet2: A low-cut 11-1/2" (29.21 cm) driver bucket rises to meet the squared-off passenger section, offering good back support
part.bullet3: The generous width of the passenger section gives great support for two-up riding while maintaining a sporty look
part.bullet4: Handsewn cover features a Tuck and Roll pattern in front with carbon fiber accents made from marine-grade expanded vinyl
part.bullet5: Mustang’s proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no break-in and retains shape and support after years of use
part.bullet6: Marine-grade fiberglass baseplate for long-lasting support and durability, with polyurethane bumpers to absorb vibration
part.bullet7: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Runaround Seat - Solo - Black - Basketweave - FLSL '18-'21

part.bullet3: Wide bucketed rider area provides excellent support in a low-profile, sporty package
part.bullet4: Handsewn cover made from marine-grade expanded vinyl
part.bullet5: Mustang’s proprietary controlled-density foam formula requires no break-in and retains shape and support after years of use

part.bullet2: A classic padded cover rests atop the hand-sculpted wide bucketed rider area and continues to a wide passenger section
part.bullet3: The proprietary controlled density foam formula delivers comfort, support, and shape retention for years in the saddle
part.bullet4: Riders are placed at a similar reach to the controls compared to stock, with excellent support and riding posture
